Instance.BindInstances: icmp_ln53_fu_397_p2 icmp_ln51_fu_377_p2 add_ln51_1_fu_383_p2 select_ln51_fu_408_p3 add_ln53_fu_416_p2 select_ln51_1_fu_525_p3 add_ln51_2_fu_421_p2 select_ln51_2_fu_427_p3 select_ln51_3_fu_435_p3 icmp_ln64_fu_453_p2 icmp_ln95_fu_459_p2 addr_cmp31_fu_534_p2 reuse_select32_fu_590_p3 addr_cmp_fu_545_p2 p12_fu_550_p3 icmp_ln64_1_fu_484_p2 and_ln64_fu_882_p2 add_ln76_fu_629_p2 add_ln76_1_fu_740_p2 add_ln78_fu_756_p2 add_ln80_fu_659_p2 sub_ln5_fu_816_p2 x_1_fu_821_p3 sub_ln5_1_fu_831_p2 select_ln5_fu_836_p3 add_ln10_fu_854_p2 mag_fu_860_p2 icmp_ln10_fu_876_p2 out_pix_fu_886_p3 out_stream_TDATA icmp_ln92_fu_570_p2 icmp_ln95_1_fu_490_p2 and_ln95_fu_495_p2 idx_3_fu_576_p2 col_4_fu_501_p2

linebuf0_U linebuf1_U icmp_ln19_fu_148_p2 icmp_ln19_1_fu_154_p2 or_ln19_fu_160_p2 icmp_ln20_fu_166_p2 icmp_ln20_1_fu_172_p2 or_ln20_fu_178_p2 add_ln95_fu_196_p2 add_ln51_fu_202_p2 mul_11ns_11ns_22_1_1_U25

field.name: Enable
field.description: Master enable for the device interrupt output to the system interrupt controller: 0 = Disabled, 1 = Enabled

field.name: CHAN0_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 0 (ap_done) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 0 interrupt, 1 = Channel 0 interrupt.

field.name: CHAN1_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 1 (ap_ready) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 1 interrupt, 1 = Channel 1 interrupt.

table.keys: Interface, Data Width, Address Width, Offset, Register
Interface, Register, Offset, Width, Access, Description, Bit Fields
table.column: GIER, 0x04, 32, RW, Global Interrupt Enable Register, 0=Enable
IP_IER, 0x08, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Enable Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_EN 1=CHAN1_INT_EN
IP_ISR, 0x0c, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Status Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_ST 1=CHAN1_INT_ST
width, 0x10, 32, W, Data signal of width,
height, 0x18, 32, W, Data signal of height,

table.keys: Interface, Direction, Register Mode, TDATA, TDEST, TID, TKEEP, TLAST, TREADY, TSTRB, TUSER, TVALID
Argument, HW Interface, HW Type, HW Info
